    O

    Observable - Klasse in view
    Base class for observable objects in the Observer design pattern.
    Observable() - Konstruktor für Klasse view.Observable
     
    Observer - Schnittstelle in view
    Interface for the Observer in the Observer design pattern.
    observers - Variable in Klasse view.Observable
     
    offsetX - Variable in Klasse view.GUIBoard
     
    offsetY - Variable in Klasse view.GUIBoard
     
    onTick - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.TurnTimer
     
    onTimeout - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.TurnTimer
     
    openMill(List<Node[]>, ImaginativePlayer, ImaginativePlayer) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
    Determines and returns a move that opens a mill by relocating a player's stone while ensuring that the target node does not have an opponent's stone as a neighbor.
    opponent - Variable in Klasse players.CPUPlayer
     
    owner - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.Stone
